expectations.evidence: File exists at the specified path with full marketing context content (194 lines).

expectations.text: Launch status is set to pre-launch (not soft launch or global)
expectations.evidence: "Current Stage: Pre-launch — 3 months to soft launch" — current stage is explicitly pre-launch; soft launch is listed only as a future target date.

expectations.text: Includes genre classification from the taxonomy (casual, mid-core, or hybrid)
expectations.evidence: "The game fuses two proven casual/mid-core genres" and "This hybrid gives players two hooks" — classified as hybrid casual/mid-core.

expectations.text: Monetization model section is present and identifies F2P + IAP
expectations.evidence: "Business Model: Free-to-play (F2P)" and "Monetization: In-app purchases (IAP) — likely gems/currency, battle passes, cosmetics, city skins, speed-ups"

expectations.text: Does not fabricate specific KPI numbers without flagging them as assumptions
expectations.evidence: KPI numbers are presented as targets ("target >3:1 at 180 days", "target: >25%"), the pre-reg goal is labeled "aspirational benchmark," and the Assumptions section explicitly flags monetization model and other details as assumed. No KPI actuals are presented as measured facts.

expectations.text: Core loop is described specifically (puzzle battles + city building), not just 'gameplay'
expectations.evidence: "City-builder loop: persistent base that grows over time, visual progression, resource management" and "Puzzle battle loop: skill-based matches that feel rewarding, not purely luck-based" — both loops named and described distinctly.
